webview.notes: Fix: APK now installs on 32-bit Android TV (armeabi-v7a, e.g. Chromecast with Google TV HD) via a universal APK. Plus stronger ad/redirect blocking: upgraded hostname filter list (HaGeZi), block forced cross-site player redirects, and a new optional 'Block all page redirects (strict)' toggle in Settings.

full.notes: Fix: per-ABI APKs now include 32-bit armeabi-v7a (use the webview build on low-end 32-bit boxes). Plus stronger ad/redirect blocking: upgraded hostname filter list (HaGeZi) and block forced cross-site player redirects (WebView engine). Note: the 'Block all page redirects' toggle is not yet active on the GeckoView engine.
